name: Glacial Beast Iceberg Narwhal
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アイスバーグ・ナーワル
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner WATER monsters
Each time another monster(s) you control is destroyed by your opponent's attack or card effect: Inflict 600 damage to your opponent. During the Battle Phase, when your opponent activates a card or effect while you control another monster (Quick Effect): You can negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only use this effect of "Glacial Beast Iceberg Narwhal" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Attribute specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
